action.prompt:
Kiro just wrote or modified a code file. Please update the README to reflect the changes:
1. Check if the modified file introduces new functions, classes, or modules
2. Update the README with any new usage instructions or examples
3. Add or update docstring/inline comments if missing from new code
4. Keep the README accurate and concise — remove outdated information
5. If no README exists yet, create one covering what the project does, how to install dependencies, and how to run it
